text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After a day out together...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way home, Mejiro Ryan stops and stares
at a display window with eager eyes.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh, Ryan and her trainer! What a coincidence!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey! Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-what is it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh! When did you get here, Ines?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You really didn't notice me? I swear...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what's caught your attention. Let's see,
let's see...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! That's a cute dress! It's kind of like a maid
outfit.
choice_data_list: Got your eye on that dress?
Got your eye on that dress?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? N-no, not one bit! I didn't even notice it
there!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But you were staring at it like you found a new
gym or something.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait... Did you change your hair?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Gaaah! You noticed?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Well... since we had plans to go out today, I
thought I'd style it a little differently.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, I get it now. You were just checking out your
hair in the window.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I keep worrying that it won't stay
together...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So I've been restless this whole time. I can't seem
to relax at all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wow... D-do I?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You really should've said so sooner!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Then Ryan wouldn't have been so self-conscious
this whole time!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You're her trainer! You need to pay more
attention!
choice_data_list:
I understand. I'll be more attentive from here on
out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: More attentive... That'd make me even more nervous!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a new understanding of Ryan's efforts, we all
head back to the academy together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! O-oh, no need to apologize! I only changed
it up a tiny bit—barely enough to notice!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
In that case... next time you should go for a
bigger, BOLDER change!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
How about wearing an outfit like the one in this
window?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Uh?! S-something cute like that? No way!
Absolutely not!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Really? I think it'd suit you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of us continue our lively conversation
as we make our way back to the academy.
